name_cn:
Premium Grade Fendi Replica
💗FEND1 Autumn/Winter New Shearling Bucket
#MonTrésor# Bucket bag, a delicate bucket shape colliding with the FF LOGO interpreted in a new way by shearling tapestry craftsmanship, adding a touch of exquisite charm to the cool trend vibe.
Embrace all your personalities and guard your girlish heart. A small bucket shape with a full body of cool FF LOGO, simple yet stylish and light and lively 🐱
Size 18x12cm
Style 277
